description: Jayawardhana Rathnayake Arachige Gamini Darmashri Vs. The Divisional Secretary of Valachchenai and Others Jayawardhana Rathnayake Arachige Gamini Darmashri Vs. The Divisional Secretary of Valachchenai and Others View More before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Jayawardhana Rathnayake Arachige Gamini Darmashri Vs. The Divisional Secretary of Valachchenai and Others Jayawardhana Rathnayake Arachige Gamini Darmashri Vs. The Divisional Secretary of Valachchenai and Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner is a lawful lessee under a lease entered into between the Petitioner and the General Manager of Railways. The 2nd Respondent (the Additional Divisional Secretary of Valachchenai), purporting to be acting under the State Lands (Recovery of Possession) Act and having sent a quit notice on the basis that the land belongs to the State, instituted an action in the Magistrate’s Court against the Petitioner to eject him from the land in suit. Held – the 2nd Respondent cannot send quit notices because he is not the competent authority as far as Railway Lands are concerned; writ lies to quash the quit notices as well as the Magistrate Court proceedings since the Petitioner is a lessee under the Railway Department.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
